services.name: Standard Document Translation
services.description: General business documents, internal memos, and non-technical correspondence.

services.name: Legal & Contractual Localization
services.description: Certified translation of MSAs, NDAs, and employment contracts by legal subject matter experts.

services.name: Website & CMS Integration
services.description: Direct API-based translation workflows for WordPress, Contentful, and Adobe Experience Manager.

services.name: Technical Manual Translation
services.description: High-precision translation for engineering specs, safety manuals, and industrial documentation.

services.name: Machine Translation Post-Editing (MTPE)
services.description: AI-driven draft generation followed by human expert review for high-volume, low-risk content.

services.name: Multilingual E-Discovery
services.description: Large-scale document screening and keyword tagging for international litigation and audits.

services.name: Software & App Internationalization
services.description: UI/UX string extraction, character limit management, and right-to-left layout adjustments.

services.name: Real-time Remote Interpreting (VRI)
services.description: On-demand video or audio interpretation for board meetings and client consultations.

services.name: Multilingual SEO & Keyword Research
services.description: Optimization of metadata and search terms for regional search engines (Baidu, Google JP, etc.).

services.name: Multimedia Subtitling & Dubbing
services.description: Transcription, time-coded subtitling, and professional voice-over for corporate training and ads.

services.name: Transcreation & Creative Copywriting
services.description: Re-imagining brand slogans and marketing campaigns to resonate with specific cultural nuances.

services.name: 24/7 Dedicated Account Desk
services.description: White-glove service with guaranteed 2-hour turnaround for urgent requests and a dedicated PM.
